reason: Clueless epitomizes late-90s high school romance with cliques, makeover scenes, and a big prom payoff.
Mad Love captures senior-year crushes and a transformative high school romance vibe.
While You Were Sleeping blends comedy and romance around a bus station holiday twist.
My Best Friend's Wedding offers classic rom-com comfort in a wedding-and-high-school nostalgia mix.
Sabrina is a charming 90s rom-com about a chauffeur’s daughter finding love among Manhattan elites.
Sense and Sensibility delivers witty period romance and family drama that feels like a comfort watch.
Jerry Maguire mixes sports drama with heartfelt romance that resonates like a classic comfort film.
Austin Powers blends romance and comedy with a playful nod to 60s teen tropes and makeovers.
Batman & Robin offers campy romance amid a comedic action-packed storyline.
French Twist is a lighthearted French comedy-romance with quirky characters and heartfelt moments.
